hero.subtitle: ENDODONTIC TREATMENT
hero.title: Root Canal Therapy
hero.description: Advanced, pain-free root canal treatment to save your natural teeth and restore your oral health.

overview.title: Modern Root Canal Treatment
overview.description: Using state-of-the-art technology and techniques, we provide comfortable and effective root canal therapy to treat infected or damaged teeth.

features.title: Advanced Diagnostics
features.description: Precise digital imaging for accurate treatment

features.title: High Success Rate
features.description: 95% success rate in saving natural teeth

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: Comprehensive examination and X-rays to assess the infection

steps.title: Preparation
steps.description: Local anesthesia and isolation of the affected tooth

steps.title: Cleaning
steps.description: Removal of infected pulp and thorough canal cleaning

steps.title: Filling
steps.description: Sealing the canals with biocompatible material

steps.title: Restoration
steps.description: Placement of permanent crown for protection

symptoms.title: When You May Need a Root Canal
symptoms.description: Common signs that indicate the need for root canal treatment

signs.title: Severe Tooth Pain
signs.description: Persistent pain when chewing or applying pressure

signs.title: Temperature Sensitivity
signs.description: Prolonged sensitivity to hot or cold

signs.title: Tooth Discoloration
signs.description: Darkening or graying of the affected tooth

signs.title: Gum Swelling
signs.description: Swollen or tender gums around the affected tooth

benefits.title: Benefits of Root Canal Treatment
benefits.description: Why choosing root canal therapy is beneficial for your oral health

items.title: Prevent Spread
items.description: Stop infection from spreading to other teeth

items.title: Long-lasting Results
items.description: Treated teeth can last a lifetime

questions.question: Is a root canal painful?
questions.answer: Modern root canal procedures are virtually painless thanks to advanced techniques and effective local anesthesia. Most patients report that it's no more uncomfortable than getting a filling.

questions.question: How long does the procedure take?
questions.answer: Most root canals can be completed in 1-2 appointments, with each session lasting 60-90 minutes depending on the complexity of the case.

questions.question: How long is the recovery period?
questions.answer: Most patients return to normal activities the next day. Mild discomfort may persist for a few days and can be managed with over-the-counter pain medication.

questions.question: How long will the treated tooth last?
questions.answer: With proper care and maintenance, a tooth treated with root canal therapy can last a lifetime. Regular dental check-ups are essential for long-term success.

pricing.title: Root Canal Treatment Costs
pricing.description: Investment in your oral health with transparent pricing

aftercare.title: Post-Treatment Care
steps: Avoid chewing on the treated tooth until fully restored

cta.title: Experiencing Tooth Pain?
cta.description: Don't wait until the pain becomes severe. Schedule your consultation today for expert evaluation.
